---
title: "Twenty Stories and Biographies from 1066 to 1485, Part 3 of the Westminster Historical Reading Books, Adapted to the Requirements of the New Code of 1891."
---

## Twenty Stories and Biographies from 1066 to 1485, Part 3 of the Westminster Historical Reading Books, Adapted to the Requirements of the New Code of 1891.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1891
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
